title: zanthoxylum schinifolium f. macrocarpum
intro: Zanthoxylum schinifolium f. macrocarpum, also known as Korean prickly ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to relieve pain, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Korean prickly ash include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and reduce stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Korean prickly ash can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusing oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
